service.unavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
service.lastOne: You must offer at least one service.

booking.providerNotAccepting: This provider is not currently accepting bookings.
booking.serviceNotAtBranch: This service is not offered at the selected branch.
booking.branchClosed: This branch is not open on the selected date.
booking.acknowledgementRequired: The preparation instructions and eligibility rules must be acknowledged before booking.
booking.slotNoLongerOffered: That time is no longer offered. Please pick another.
booking.slotUnavailable: That time is not available. Please pick another.
booking.duplicateForProfile: {name} already has a booking at this time.
booking.notAwaitingPayment: This booking is no longer awaiting payment.
booking.holdExpired: Your {minutes}-minute reservation window expired and the place was released. Please book again.
booking.paymentFailed: The payment did not go through, so the place was released. Please try booking again.
booking.cannotCancel: A booking that is {status, select, completed {completed} no_show {recorded as missed} cancelled_by_patient {already cancelled} cancelled_by_provider {already cancelled} refund_pending {awaiting a refund} refunded {refunded} other {in this state}} cannot be cancelled.
booking.noRefundPending: There is no refund pending on this booking.
booking.notConfirmedForCompletion: Only a confirmed booking can be completed.
booking.notConfirmedForNoShow: Only a confirmed booking can be marked as missed.
booking.noShowTooEarly: A missed visit can only be recorded after the session has ended.
booking.longWaitOnNoShow: This visit is recorded as missed. Please contact support to correct it.
booking.notReschedulable: Only a live booking can be rescheduled.
booking.invalidTransition: A booking cannot be moved to {status, select, held {a hold} awaiting_payment {awaiting payment} confirmed {confirmed} refund_pending {refund pending} other {that status}} directly.

capacity.comfortBusy: This session is busy. You can still book — the wait will be longer.
capacity.strictFull: This session is now full. Here is the next available time.
capacity.strictFullReschedule: That session is full. Please pick another time.

violation.gender: {service} is only available to {gender, select, male {male} female {female} other {eligible}} patients.
violation.min_age: {service} is for patients aged {minAge} and over. {name} is {age}.
violation.max_age: {service} is for patients aged {maxAge} and under. {name} is {age}.
violation.condition: {service} is not suitable for patients with {condition}.

rule.gendersOnly: {gender, select, male {Men} female {Women} other {Eligible patients}} only

profile.selfExists: This account already has a profile for you. Add this person as a family member instead.
profile.cannotRemoveSelf: Your own profile cannot be removed.
profile.hasBookings: {name} has {count, plural, one {# booking} other {# bookings}} on record. Medical and booking history belongs to the profile, so it cannot be removed.

coupon.unknown: This coupon code does not exist.
coupon.inactive: This coupon is no longer active.
coupon.usageLimitReached: This coupon has reached its usage limit.
coupon.onlyForProviderType: This coupon only applies to {type, select, doctor {doctor} lab {lab} radiology {radiology} other {certain}} bookings.
coupon.notForThisProviderType: This coupon does not apply to this kind of booking.
coupon.belowMinimum: Requires a minimum order of EGP {amount}.
coupon.codeExists: A coupon with that code already exists.

review.notCompleted: You can only review a completed appointment.
review.alreadyExists: You have already reviewed this appointment.

auth.accountNotFound: No account found with that email address.
auth.accountSuspended: This account has been suspended. Contact support.
auth.emailTaken: An account with that email already exists.
auth.otpIncorrect: That code is incorrect. Please try again.
auth.noDemoAccount: No demo account available for the "{role}" role.

schedule.invalidWindow: {startTime}–{endTime} is not a valid working window.
schedule.capacityRequired: A working day needs a capacity of at least one place.

holiday.duplicate: That date is already marked as a holiday.

api.validation: Please check the highlighted fields and try again.
api.unauthenticated: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
api.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
api.notFound: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
api.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
api.serverError: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
api.requestFailed: That request didn't go through. Please try again.
api.networkError: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
api.notConfigured: The app isn't configured to reach the API. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL.
